response.justification: Exceeds the 15-year engineering minimum with 20 years of full-stack and infrastructure experience, including recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. However, lacks the director-level strategic and advisory positioning the role explicitly requires, and demonstrates execution depth rather than recognized AI domain expertise—the role's primary focus. Current title remains Staff Engineer, not director-level IC.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience, exceeding minimum requirements
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) shows current relevance
Proven ability to build and scale systems at high throughput (millions of requests/sec, distributed platforms)
concerns: No evidence of director-level strategic influence, organizational impact, or advisory relationships with customers/partners
Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth—current role is AI-infrastructure adjacent, not AI domain expertise or recognized AI products
Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI and no public thought leadership, research, or recognized expertise in AI domain

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI domain expertise for role focus
Exceeds minimum experience and technical breadth
